# vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ vmnet ](/documentation/vmnet)

- [ vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key ](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key)

-  vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key 

Global Variable# vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
let vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key: UnsafePointer<CChar>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_estimated_packets_available_key#Discussion)

The estimated number of packets available to be read.

This key is used for the `vmnet` event.

The value for this key is of type [`XPC_TYPE_UINT64`](/documentation/XPC/XPC_TYPE_UINT64-swift.var).
